/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pbv_temperature_gui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pbv_temperature_gui.dir/pbv_temperature_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_temperature_gui.dir/temperature_monitor/temperature_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_temperature_gui.dir/temperature_monitor/temperaturewindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pbv_temperature_gui.dir/common/telemetry_client.cpp.o -o pbv_temperature_gui  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Charts.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
